name: Quik Pawn Shop
message: Founded in 1978, Quik Pawn Shops™ operates in 15 locations in Montgomery, Birmingham, Mobile and Tuscaloosa areas. We obtained 140Gb of files of this organization and make them available for you soon. There is also a BD with complete information of their customers. Millions of lines with DOB, addresses, ssns, financials transactions and stuff like that.
